case_title: S.J. DISTRIBUTORS LLC VS. BERBER GROUP, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-31-2024 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-31-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF S.J. DISTRIBUTORS LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JIAXIN HUANG. DEFENDANT BERBER GROUP LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TONY GARNICKI. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. PARTIES CONFERRED IN COURT AND STATED THEY HAVE AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANECE AT THE NEXT HEARING, MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $72.61 FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.J. DISTRIBUTORS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GARNICKI, TONY AN INDIVIDUAL AKA ANTHONY GARNICKI

REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO ORDER FILED ON 8/4/2025. (SEE MANAGER FOR ORDER.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,902.93 FILED BY S.J. DISTRIBUTORS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERBER GROUP, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BERBER GARNICKI, TONY AN INDIVIDUAL AKA ANTHONY GARNICKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BERBER GROUP, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BERBER
